evals.prompt: Acabo de registrar el desglose de una tarea grande con task-planning y el run vive en un worktree dedicado. Abre la bitácora del run.
evals.expected_output: Copies the bundled template to .claude/binnacle.md in the worktree, fills the Run header including the Resume with entry point, seeds the Ledger with the registered breakdown, and ensures .claude/binnacle.md is listed in the repo's local exclude file without touching the tracked .gitignore.
expectations: The agent copies references/binnacle-template.md to .claude/binnacle.md inside the worktree
The agent fills the Run header, including the Resume with entry point
The agent seeds the Ledger table with the registered breakdown
The agent appends .claude/binnacle.md to the git common dir's info/exclude only if absent
The agent does not edit the tracked .gitignore

evals.prompt: Sesión nueva dentro de un worktree que ya tiene .claude/binnacle.md de una corrida interrumpida. Retoma el run.
evals.expected_output: Reads the binnacle whole, reconciles its Ledger against git log base..HEAD trusting commits over the file, re-registers non-integrated tasks with TaskCreate preserving group codes, states and owners, and continues through the entry point named in Resume with.
expectations: The agent reads the whole binnacle before acting
The agent reconciles the Ledger against git log base..HEAD, trusting commits when they disagree
The agent re-registers non-integrated tasks preserving group codes, states and owners
The agent continues through the entry point named in Resume with instead of choosing one itself
